plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the deterministic cache attempted to interact with a 'Last Name' field that is not present in the current UI state. The failure screenshot shows a 'Your Name' field instead, and a 'Set 2' indicator suggesting dynamic form variations.
observedIndicators: selectorFailedDuringPageAi === true (inputText for Last Name failed)
Visual mismatch: Failure screenshot shows 'Your Name' while tool attempted 'Last Name'
UI contains 'Set 2' badge, suggesting dynamic content variation that breaks static caches

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry test.
remediationSteps.details: Execute the test again with the 'clearPageAiCache' flag set to true. This will force the AI to re-analyze the page and adapt to the 'Your Name' field.

remediationSteps.summary: Consider disabling deterministic mode for dynamic survey variants.
remediationSteps.details: If the survey fields rotate frequently (e.g., between 'First/Last Name' and 'Your Name'), consider disabling DETERMINISTIC mode for this specific test to ensure it always adapts to the current variant.

plan.notes: The automation was running in DETERMINISTIC mode. The visual evidence shows the form structure has changed or is rotating (Set 2), making the cached selectors for 'Last Name' invalid. Clearing the cache will allow the AI to adapt to the current form fields.
